title: Python Coding for QA/SDET

description: Java fundamentals and automation helper problems commonly asked in SDET interviews.

title: SQL / PostgreSQL
description: Querying, aggregation, joins, and validation patterns for database-backed testing.

title: Selenium

description: TypeScript Playwright test runner, locators, fixtures, API testing, and CI execution.

title: API Testing

title: Test Automation Strategy
description: Automation architecture, test pyramid decisions, maintainability, ownership, and ROI.

title: CI/CD for QA/SDET
description: Pipeline quality gates, smoke/regression stages, reports, retries, and secrets handling.

title: AWS Basics for QA/SDET
description: CloudWatch, S3, Lambda, IAM, deployment validation, and cloud testing fundamentals.
